NinjaVsSamuraiRules.Rule1: Ninja vs Samurai is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring free spins with multiplier and Wild symbols addition.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minBetMtp} and %{maxBetMtp} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 30 bet line (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

NinjaVsSamuraiRules.Rule3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
NinjaVsSamuraiRules.Rule4: Each Ninja Feature free spin or Samurai Feature free spin will be played based on the order of the free spins above the reels.

NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain1: Ninja Feature can be triggered randomly on any main game spin.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain2: During the Ninja Feature, all wins on the reels will be multiplied by x2, x3 or x5.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain3: Samurai Feature can be triggered randomly on any main game spin.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain4: During the Samurai Feature, 1 to 5 reels will be chosen to be filled with Wild symbols.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain5: 3 Ninja Scatter symbols and/or Samurai Scatter symbols appearing anywhere on reels 2, 3 and 4 will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 9 free spins.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain6: Before the start of the Free Spins Feature, each Ninja Scatter symbol will be converted into 3 Ninja Feature free spins and each Samurai Scatter symbol will be converted into 3 Samurai Feature free spins. The order of the free spins are then shuffled and placed above the reels.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain7: During the Ninja Feature free spin, all wins on the reels will be multiplied by x2, x3 or x5.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain8: During the Samurai Feature free spin, 1 to 5 reels will be chosen to be filled with Wild symbols.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain9: During any free spin, the free spin has a chance to be converted into a Ninja Samurai Feature free spin, where 1 to 5 reels will be chosen to be filled with Wild symbols and all wins on the reels will be multiplied by x2, x3 or x5.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain10: 1 or more Ninja Scatter symbol appearing anywhere on reels 2, 3 and 4 will award 1 Ninja Feature free spin for each Ninja Scatter symbol.
NinjaVsSamuraiFeatures.PayoutExplain11: 1 or more Samurai Scatter symbol appearing anywhere on reels 2, 3 and 4 will award 1 Samurai Feature free spin for each Samurai Scatter symbol.

NinjaVsSamuraiCommonRule.WildExplanation1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Ninja Scatter symbol and Samurai Scatter symbol.
NinjaVsSamuraiCommonRule.WildExplanation2: Ninja Scatter symbol and Samurai Scatter symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
